nasb.text: Ram was the father of Amminadab, Amminadab the father of Nahshon, and Nahshon the father of Salmon.

esv.text: and Ram the father of Amminadab, and Amminadab the father of Nahshon, and Nahshon the father of Salmon,

cnv.text: 亞蘭生亞米拿達，亞米拿達生拿順，拿順生撒門，

ccb.text: 兰生亚米拿达， 亚米拿达生拿顺， 拿顺生撒门，

csbs.text: 亚兰生亚米拿达， 亚米拿达生拿顺， 拿顺生撒门，
